zh.lifeSummary: 當Sambor II Duke of Pomerania於1211年出生時，他的父親Mściwoj "Gdański" Sobiesławic I42歲，母親Swinislawa45歲。他和Matilda of Mecklenburg至少有3個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1278年12月享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sambor II Duke of Pomerania于1211年出生时，他的父亲Mściwoj "Gdański" Sobiesławic I42岁，母亲Swinislawa45岁。他和Matilda of Mecklenburg至少有3个儿子和6个女儿。他去世于1278年12月享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sambor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jadwiga, Janina, Jozef, Wladyslaw, Zygmunt.  German Monika.
Polish: from an Old Slavic personal name composed of the elements sam ‘himself; alone’ (Old Slavic samъ) + bor ‘to fight’ (from boriti se).
Polish and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Sambor, now Sambir in Ukraine.

variants.name: Sambol
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Moshe, Sima.
Jewish (from Austrian Galicia): possibly a variant of   Sambor  .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sambor II Duke of Pomerania was born in 1211, his father, Mściwoj "Gdański" Sobiesławic I, was 42 and his mother, Swinislawa, was 45. He had at least 3 sons and 6 daughters with Matilda of Mecklenburg. He died in December 1278, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sambor II Duke of Pomerania est né en 1211, son père, Mściwoj "Gdański" Sobiesławic I, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Swinislawa, avait 45 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles avec Matilda of Mecklenburg. Il est décédé en décembre 1278, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sambor II Duke of Pomerania 1211 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Mściwoj "Gdański" Sobiesławic I 42 und seine Mutter Swinislawa 45. Er hatte mit Matilda of Mecklenburg mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb im Dezember 1278 im Alter von 67 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sambor II Duke of Pomerania è nato il nel 1211, il suo padre, Mściwoj "Gdański" Sobiesławic I, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Swinislawa, aveva 45 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie con Matilda of Mecklenburg. Morì nel dicembre 1278, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sambor II Duke of Pomeraniaが1211年に生まれた時，父Mściwoj "Gdański" Sobiesławic Iは42歳，母Swinislawaは45歳であった。彼はMatilda of Mecklenburgとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼は1278年12月に67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sambor II Duke of Pomerania(이)가 1211년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mściwoj "Gdański" Sobiesławic I(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Swinislawa(은)는 45세였다. 그는 Matilda of Mecklenburg(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1278년 12월 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sambor II Duke of Pomerania nasceu em 1211, seu pai, Mściwoj "Gdański" Sobiesławic I, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Swinislawa, tinha 45 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas com Matilda of Mecklenburg. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1278, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sambor II Duke of Pomerania родился в 1211 г., его отцу по имени Mściwoj "Gdański" Sobiesławic I было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Swinislawa, 45. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей от Matilda of Mecklenburg. Он умер декабрь 1278 г. в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sambor II Duke of Pomerania nació en 1211, su papá, Mściwoj "Gdański" Sobiesławic I, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Swinislawa, tenía 45 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas con Matilda of Mecklenburg. Murió en diciembre de 1278, a la edad de 67 años.
